title: WorkshopLM Build Week briefing
script:
Briefing: WorkshopLM Build Week.

The central finding is this: WorkshopLM turns messy meetings into professional knowledge work teams can defend, with grounded source documents and brand rules preserving their standards

The evidence adds an important point: Creating client-ready work is slow and fragmented, because understanding, design, and production live in disconnected tools

The practical decision is how to act on this: Every factual claim retains an exact source locator, so evidence stays inspectable from the editable Map through the final presentation and Storyboard
